js: (function(){try{const snap=window.__t5_midCombatSnap;const issues=[];const rs=snap?.runState;const ts=snap?.turnState;if(!ts)issues.push('no turnState in snapshot');if(!rs)issues.push('no runState in snapshot');const badFields=['reviewStateSnapshot'];for(const f of badFields){if(rs&&f in rs&&rs[f]!==null&&rs[f]!==undefined){const v=rs[f];if(typeof v==='object'&&!(v.__type)){issues.push('BAD_FIELD_'+f+': '+JSON.stringify(v).slice(0,60))}}}const setFields=['consumedRewardFactIds','factsAnsweredCorrectly','factsAnsweredIncorrectly','firstChargeFreeFactIds','offeredRelicIds','cursedFactIds','attemptedFactIds'];for(const f of setFields){if(rs&&f in rs){const v=rs[f];if(v&&typeof v==='object'&&!Array.isArray(v)&&!(v.__type)){issues.push('SET_FIELD_NOT_SERIALIZED_'+f+':'+typeof v)}}}return JSON.stringify({sub1_result:issues.length===0?'PASS':'FAIL',issues:issues,snapshotHasRunState:!!rs,snapshotHasTurnState:!!ts})}catch(e){return JSON.stringify({error:e.message})}})()
